debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

proof:
use Set.range (fun k => ⟨2 + 3 * k, Nat.succ_pos _⟩)
  constructor
  · exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective fun _ _ h => Nat.add_left_cancel (congrArg Subtype.val h)
  · intro ⟨m, _⟩ ⟨_, hm⟩ ⟨n, _⟩ ⟨_, hn⟩ hmn
    obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := hm
    obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := hn
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at hmn
    omega
